description: Attio is an AI-native, highly customizable CRM that connects your data, automates workflows, and adapts to how your team sells, built for startups and B2B SaaS.
overview: Attio is a flexible, AI-native CRM that connects data sources, automates workflows, and adapts to each team's process, with reporting and AI for tasks like prospecting.
what_is: Attio is an AI-native CRM built for flexibility. Rather than forcing teams into a fixed structure, it lets them shape the CRM around their own process, building workflows, automating tasks, and generating reports from one platform.

It suits B2B SaaS companies and growing startups, and is strong at managing outreach, tracking deals, and nurturing leads with AI-driven insight. Syncing with email, calendar, and other data sources means it is useful soon after setup.

Attio connects with tools like Gmail, Slack, and data warehouses to enrich records and support engagement. It is not aimed at large enterprises needing deep ERP customization; it fits teams wanting a fast, adaptable CRM with smart automation.
